place: Cape Yamu, Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Villa Amarapura — Beachfront Estate, Cape Yamu
blurb: A seven-bedroom beachfront estate on Cape Yamu's serene eastern coast — a 25-metre infinity pool over the Andaman, a starlit atrium living room, cinema, games room with golf simulator, gym and its own basketball court, with six staff.
detail:
Situated in the luxurious vacation haven of Cape Yamu on Phuket's serene eastern coastline overlooking the Andaman Sea, Villa Amarapura is a seven-bedroom contemporary villa vision. Built in 2016 across 2,570 m² on a 7,300 m² beachfront plot, it combines the must-have elements of a luxury holiday rental — including six staff and a private chef — with stunning features and upscale design, for a chic, glamorous and comfortable retreat.

The infinity pool is absolutely stunning, with super-king beds in the two master rooms and gorgeous sea, pool or garden views from every bedroom; one suite is housed in an ultra-modern white-cube bungalow down a stepping-stone path. Bathrooms have star quality with rounded freestanding tubs, and an over-the-pool deck and wooden nest seats lend the outdoor space a trendy feel. In the evening, the architecture of the atrium living room lights up with magical starlight chandeliers.

Relaxation meets activity: a cinema, TV room and lounge, a games room with a high-tech golf simulator and pool table, a fitness room, a putting green, a basketball court and a poolside BBQ sala. Practise your swing, shoot some hoops, or kayak the bay — Villa Amarapura delivers a truly exceptional villa vacation, minutes from COMO Point Yamu and the estate's restaurants.

features.l: 25 m infinity pool over the Andaman
Cinema & games room w/ golf simulator
